userStories.title: Add hashed token storage
userStories.description: As a system, I want hashed token storage with a nullable revocation timestamp so token state is durable.
acceptanceCriteria: Nullable revocation timestamp defaults to null.

userStories.title: Add create-token server action
userStories.description: As a system, I want a create-token server action that validates label length and returns the plaintext token once.
acceptanceCriteria: The plaintext token is returned once.

userStories.title: Add revoke-token server action
userStories.description: As a system, I want a revoke-token server action that marks the token revoked without deleting it.
acceptanceCriteria: Tokens are marked revoked without deletion.
